016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.rpc;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode;
019import org.bitcoinj.base.Address;
020import org.bitcoinj.base.Coin;
021import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.BlockChainInfo;
022import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.NetworkInfo;
023import org.bitcoinj.base.Sha256Hash;
024import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.SignedRawTransaction;
025import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.UnspentOutput;
026
027import java.util.List;
028import java.util.Map;
029import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
030
031/**
032 * Standard Bitcoin JSON-RPC API RPCs. For now, this is a subset implementation that is not fully-compatible
033 * with Bitcoin Core. Some parameters are missing and the defined response types may omit some properties.
034 * <p>
035 * All parameters are object types so {@code null} can be used to represent an omitted optional parameter.
036 */
037public interface BitcoinJsonRpc {
038    int DEFAULT_MIN_CONF = 1;
039    int DEFAULT_MAX_CONF = 9999999;
040
041    /* == Blockchain == */
042
043    CompletableFuture<Sha256Hash> getbestblockhash();
044    // TODO: Support Sha256Hash type in request params: see Issue #104
045//  CompletableFuture<Object> getblock(Sha256Hash blockHash, Integer verbosity);
046    CompletableFuture<JsonNode> getblock(String blockHashString, Integer verbosity);
047    CompletableFuture<BlockChainInfo> getblockchaininfo();
048    CompletableFuture<Integer> getblockcount();
049    CompletableFuture<Sha256Hash> getblockhash(Integer blockNumber);
050    CompletableFuture<JsonNode> getblockheader(String blockHashString, Boolean verbose);
051
052    /* == Control == */
053
054    CompletableFuture<String> help();
055    CompletableFuture<String> stop();
056
057    /* == Network == */
058
059    CompletableFuture<Integer> getconnectioncount();
060    CompletableFuture<NetworkInfo> getnetworkinfo();
061
062    /* == Rawtransactions == */
063
064    CompletableFuture<String> createrawtransaction(List<Map<String, Object>> inputs, List<Map<String, String>> outputs);
065    CompletableFuture<Sha256Hash> sendrawtransaction(String hex);
066
067    /* == Wallet == */
068
069    CompletableFuture<Coin> getbalance();
070    CompletableFuture<Address> getnewaddress();
071    CompletableFuture<List<UnspentOutput>> listunspent(Integer minConf, Integer maxConf, List<String> addresses, Boolean includeUnsafe);
072    CompletableFuture<Sha256Hash> sendtoaddress(String address, Double amount);
073
074    // TODO: Add prevtxs and sighashtype parameters
075    /**
076     * Currently all UTXOs must be present in the wallet and {@code sighashtype} defaults to {@code "ALL"}.
077     * @param hex hex-encoded unsigned raw transaction
078     * @return An object containing the signed transaction
079     */
080    CompletableFuture<SignedRawTransaction> signrawtransactionwithwallet(String hex);
081}
